name: Nearby Glasses
subtitle: Detect smart glasses nearby via BLE
description: Scans Bluetooth Low Energy advertisements to detect smart glasses devices.

apps.name: Nearby Glasses
apps.localizedDescription: Scans Bluetooth Low Energy advertisements to detect smart glasses devices nearby. No account required.
apps.versionDescription:
## Installation
Sideload with [AltStore](https://altstore.io), [SideStore](https://sidestore.io),
or [Sideloadly](https://sideloadly.io). This is an **unsigned IPA** — AltStore/SideStore
will re-sign it with your Apple ID.

## Verify integrity
```
shasum -a 256 -c NearbyGlasses-v1.0.0.ipa.sha256
```
[SLSA provenance attestation](https://github.com/adamhurm/yj_nearbyglasses_ios/attestations)
is also available.

privacy.name: Bluetooth
privacy.usageDescription: Nearby Glasses scans Bluetooth Low Energy advertisements to detect smart glasses devices nearby.
